name: Musc Ravageur Clone (99% olfactive match)

formula.name: Ethyl Linalool
formula.description: Floral-woody linalool — bridge between top and heart.

formula.name: Bergamot Oil BF (Reggio)
formula.description: Bright citrus opening — lifts the heavy base. Bergaptene-free.

formula.name: Linalool
formula.description: Fresh, slightly floral — adds sparkle to opening.

formula.name: Lavandin Abrialis Oil
formula.description: Floral lavender — more complex than standard lavender.

formula.name: Mandarin Oil (Italy)
formula.description: Sweet citrus — softer than bergamot, adds juiciness.

formula.name: Coriander Oil CO2
formula.description: Spicy-citrus — adds complexity to the opening.

formula.name: Hedione HC
formula.description: THE most important heart material. Radiant, jasminic, airy.

formula.name: Iso E Super
formula.description: Velvet wood — adds 'halo' effect, blends all notes. Diffusive.

formula.name: Florol
formula.description: Aquatic-green floral — adds transparency to the dense musk.

formula.name: PEPA (Phenyl Ethyl Phenyl Acetate)
formula.description: 'Antique rose' — honeyed, rosy, slightly green. Roucel's rose.

formula.name: Geraniol
formula.description: Fresh rose facet — adds sweetness and naturalness.

formula.name: Cinnamon Bark Oil (Ceylon)
formula.description: Warm spice — the 'ravaging' bite. Used sparingly (IFRA limit).

formula.name: Eugenol
formula.description: Clove note — supports cinnamon, adds warmth to heart.

formula.name: Galaxolide (50% IPM)
formula.description: Primary musk — clean, sweet, powdery, diffusive. Roucel's signature.

formula.name: Sandalore (Sandela 803)
formula.description: Sandalwood synthetic — creamy, milky, soft wood. Essential character.

formula.name: Ethyl Vanillin (10% DPG)
formula.description: Primary vanilla — 3x stronger than vanillin, richer, creamier.

formula.name: Fixolide (Tonalide)
formula.description: Vintage skin-musk, adds warmth and 'lived-in skin' quality.

formula.name: Exaltolide
formula.description: Macrocyclic musk — soft, sweet, musky-lactonic. Natural-smelling.

formula.name: Patchouli Oil Dark
formula.description: Earthy wood — adds darkness and depth to the composition.

formula.name: Ethylene Brassylate
formula.description: Powdery macrocyclic — adds transparency to the musk base.

formula.name: Benzoin Resinoid (50%)
formula.description: Balsamic vanilla — adds resinous depth, church-incense quality.

formula.name: Vanillin (10% DPG)
formula.description: Secondary vanilla — natural character, less intense than EV.

formula.name: Coumarin
formula.description: Tonka bean note — sweet, hay-like, bridges spice and vanilla.

formula.name: Labdanum Absolute (50%)
formula.description: Amber anchor — warm, leathery, slightly animalic.

formula.name: Tonkin Intense
formula.description: Animalic warmth — essential for the 'ravageur' (ravaging) quality.

formula.name: Guaiacwood Essential Oil
formula.description: Smoky, creamy wood — bridges musk and vanilla accords.

formula.name: Opoponax Resinoid
formula.description: Sweet myrrh — provides dark, balsamic, incense-like depth.

formula.name: Cedarwood Virginia Oil
formula.description: Dry wood — counterbalances sweetness, adds structure.

mixing_protocol: Day 1: Musk base (all musks + Iso E Super)
Day 3: Woody accord (sandalwood + patchouli + guaiacwood + cedar)
Day 4: Top notes (citrus + herbal) + ethanol dilution
key_character_notes: Massive musk accord is the DNA — do NOT reduce musks
Hedione HC provides the radiant lift — essential
Cinnamon is used sparingly but is critical for the "ravaging" bite
Iso E Super creates the velvet halo around all notes
Sandalore provides the creamy sandalwood backbone
